calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llcs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Dec-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC's Hearing On Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llcs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

Grant. No opposition filed.

The court will sign the proposed order and proposed judgment included in the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
